emergency_definition: total power loss in occupied site

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: we are alerting the on-call electrician and they should expect callback in under 12 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules: Gather caller info and problem summary, then send to front desk scheduling queue

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: We are lining up the right electrician now and will stay with you

integration_constraints: We use Jobber; do not quote prices and do not book permit-related jobs automatically
after_hours_flow_summary: Confirm emergency, route urgent calls to on-call electrician, non-urgent gets a next-day callback ticket
